hero.description: Transforming ideas into impactful digital experiences through strategic design and immersive interfaces.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Manifesto
about.p1: I'm Lucas, a designer passionate about creating digital experiences that connect people and brands. With a degree in Graphic Design, a postgraduate degree in UX/UI, and an MBA in Digital Marketing, I develop solutions that unite aesthetics, strategy, and usability.
about.p2: I believe that good design goes beyond appearance — it's about solving real problems, creating emotional connections, and delivering measurable results. Every project is an opportunity to transform visions into digital reality.
about.p3: Shall we create something extraordinary together?

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.desc: Deep immersion into the business, audience, and goals. Research, interviews, and competitive analysis to build solid foundations.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.desc: Definition of information architecture, user flows, and wireframes. Every decision is guided by data and purpose.

design.title: Design
design.desc: Visual creation with obsessive attention to detail. Interfaces that delight, communicate, and convert.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.desc: Complete handoff with documentation, interactive prototyping, and implementation support.

portfolio.title: Selected Projects
portfolio.description: A curation of works that represent my design vision — where strategy, aesthetics, and functionality meet.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I can do for you

uxresearch.title: UX Research
uxresearch.desc: Qualitative and quantitative research to understand users, map pain points, and identify value opportunities.

uidesign.title: UI Design
uidesign.desc: Sophisticated and consistent visual interfaces, focused on hierarchy, typography, and scalable design systems.

webdesign.title: Web Design
webdesign.desc: High-conversion websites and landing pages that balance impeccable aesthetics with performance and SEO.

designsystems.title: Design Systems
designsystems.desc: Component libraries, tokens, and guidelines that ensure consistency and speed in development.

contact.title: Let's Talk?
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I want to hear about it. Let's transform your vision into reality.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
